name: 9853-mcp-fresh-conversation
_purpose: Evidence for warpdotdev/warp#9853: a globally configured file-based MCP server (~/.warp-oss/.mcp.json) is visible to the Warp agent in a fresh conversation, before any terminal command has been run. The agent should call the proof-mcp 'whoami' tool and the recipe approves the Run gate so the tool's return value renders on screen.
_safety: Every typing/clicking step is preceded by `expect_text` anchors. `abort_if_text` patterns target shell-history dropdown content (the empirical leak surface), not the always-visible search-bar chrome. `click_text` hard-fails if OCR can't find the target — never blind-clicks.

steps.text: use the whoami tool from proof-mcp

steps.regex: (OK if I call this MCP tool|MCP Tool: whoami)
